subject: [CLI] Set version to 6.0.1
commit_message:
[CLI] Set version to 6.0.1

Set the newest version of cli image.

Issue-ID: CLI-362
Signed-off-by: Zebek Bogumil <bogumil.zebek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I963168ff6c10a8b66a3d2c61fe5f169b0ddee871
